title: cornus interior
intro: Cornus interior, also known as American dogwood, is a flowering plant native to eastern North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Cornus interior include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments, including fever, sore throats, and digestive issues.
